arts.ttl: Gyokeres and Osimhen transfers taking shape as Arsenal move for No.9 sensation
arts.sum: Gyokeres and Osimhen transfers taking shape as Arsenal move for No.9 sensation Arsenal registered their interest in a Serie A wonderkid and Chelsea began mulling over a €50 million offer for a reliable defender.

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood is DROPPED by Roberto De Zerbi - just days after Marseille manager's pointed comments about former Man United forward
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has been dropped by Roberto De Zerbi after the Marseille manager admitted he was unimpressed with the Englishman despite his fine scoring form.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set for £10.5m cash injection after breaking Champions League record
arts.sum: Arsenal have all but booked their place in the Champions League quarter-finals after thrashing PSV 7-1 in Eindhoven but Liverpool and Aston Villa are also chasing lucrative financial bonuses as they bid to see off Paris Saint-Germain and Club Brugge, respectively

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim must follow Mikel Arteta Arsenal advice after Man United criticism
arts.sum: Manchester United will return to Premier League action against Arsenal at Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Exclusive Arsenal Transfer News: Gunners target Bologna wonderkid Santiago Castro
arts.sum: Arsenal scouts are closely monitoring Bologna's talented Argentine forward Santiago Castro as they look to strengthen their attacking options over the coming seasons, FootballTransfers understands. Beyond his league performances, Castro has been instrumental in Bologna's cup runs, notably scoring the decisive goal that propelled the club into the Coppa Italia semifinals for the first time in 26 years.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Arsenal - Premier League
arts.sum: How Man Utd could line up for their Premier League clash with Arsenal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Man Utd - Premier League
arts.sum: Here is how Arsenal could line up for their clash with Man Utd in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'I took the decision' - Nico Williams opens up on reason for Arsenal transfer choice - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal's summer transfer target Nico Williams has opened up on his decision to snub interest from elsewhere in order to stay at Athletic Bilbao. Speaking recently to France Football, Williams opened up on his decision to stay at Bilbao, admitting he'd struggle to find what he already has elsewhere.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres transfer stance made clear amid huge £54m update and Man United links
arts.sum: Manchester United have been following the situation of Viktor Gyokeres at Sporting CP and could pounce in the summer

arts.ttl: ‘Better than Phil Foden’: Troy Deeney says Arsenal have a player who’s reminded him of Jack Wilshere this year
